# PHIL.169 ? Asymmetric Warfare

**Type:** PHILOSOPHY
**Category:** competitive_strategy
**Subcategory:** asymmetric_warfare
**Domain:** COMPETITIVE_STRATEGY
**Status:** active

## Core Principles
Fight battles where you have unfair advantages

## Application
Choose favorable battlegrounds, leverage unique strengths, avoid direct strength-on-strength competition

philosophy, competitive-strategy, asymmetric-warfare
